name: Insurance
description: Insurance products and services. Campaigns promoting health, auto, home, life, or commercial insurance.

regulatory_frameworks.name: US ACA and State Insurance Codes
regulatory_frameworks.summary: Restrictions on using health status, genetic information, and certain demographic attributes for insurance advertising targeting. State-level regulation varies.

guidance: Home insurance campaigns may overlap with 'housing'. Use 'insurance' when the product is the insurance policy itself, not the underlying property transaction.
